message:
test(web): comprehensive command palette shortcut drift regression tests

Add tests to ensure command palette shortcuts stay in sync with ActionRegistry:
- Verify all ActionIds have registry entries
- Ensure required fields for palette display (id, title, category, shortcut)
- Validate overlay actions have overlayId/overlayAction for auto-generation
- Check shortcut formatting consistency
- Detect duplicate action IDs
- Validate action ID naming pattern

Closes phage_explorer-s4qx.1.9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
